responseMessageContents.text: The user seems to have just provided a Cloudflare API token without any explicit instructions. Based on the previous messages, they likely want me to redeploy the Heavyar Cloudflare Worker again with a new token. Let me check the current state of the worker code and deploy it.
I see you've provided a new Cloudflare API token. Let me redeploy the Heavyar worker with this token.

responseMessageContents.text:
The Cloudflare API token you provided (`cfat_NYwq...`) failed authentication with error code 9106. This typically means the token is invalid, expired, or doesn't have the required permissions.

Could you generate a new Cloudflare API token with these permissions:
- **Account > Cloudflare Workers Scripts > Edit**
- **Zone > Workers Routes > Edit** (if using custom domains)

You can create one at: https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens
